contract_claim: Module-level code instantiates TestResultsAnalyzer and calls analyze() immediately (L260-263) with no `require.main === module` / `import.meta.url` guard. Any other file that imports this module will trigger CLI execution, process.exit() calls, and console output as a side effect.
observed_behavior: Module-level code instantiates TestResultsAnalyzer and calls analyze() immediately (L260-263) with no `require.main === module` / `import.meta.url` guard. Any other file that imports this module will trigger CLI execution, process.exit() calls, and console output as a side effect.
